titleStmt.title: SII 41.470: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 470. (A.R. No. 684 of 1905.) Tiruvēḍagam, Nilakkottai Taluk, Madura District. On the east wall of the first prakara, left of entrance, of the Patrikāparamēśvara temple at Tiruvēḍagam.

p.hi: Pāṇḍya, Māṟavarman Sundara-Pāṇḍya I, Year 8 = 1224 A.D.

summary.p: At the request of the officer Maḻavarāyaṉ the king made the village Tōḍaṉēri as tax-free dēvadāna to the temple of Tiruvēḍagam, excluding the lands given earlier as udirappaṭṭi, paḷḷichchandam and dēvadāna. The granted village is said to be a chēvaga-jīvita-muṟṟūṭṭu village in Pāgaṉūr-kūṟṟam. Many officers have signed the document.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravatti koṉeriṉmai koṇṭāṉ pākaṉūṟk kūṟṟattu
Uṭaiyār tiruveṭakamuṭaiyanāyaṉār koyiṟ śrīrudra śrīmāheśvaraṟkku Ināyaṉārkku
Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa nitta nimantaṅkaḷukku Ikkūṟṟattu nilaikaḷil māṅ
kāy kuṭiniṟkuñ cevakacivita muṟṟūṭṭāṉa nilaṅkaḷil toṭaṉeriyāṉa toṭuṭaiya
ceviyaṉukku kiḻellai puliyūr kiḻavaṉkālukkum paravai Ellaikku mēṟkkum teṉ
ṉellai Uṭaiyār tiruppūvaṇamuṭaiyanāyaṉār tevatāṉam maṭaippuṟattu
kku vaṭakku melellai mākākkuṭippaṟṟukku kiḻakkum vaṭavellai ciṟumuttālaṅkuḷat
tukku teṟkkum Innāṉkellaikkuḷpaṭṭa kuḷamum kuḷapparippum nañcey puñcaiyum na
ttamum nattapāḻum maṟṟumeppeṟpaṭṭaṉavum Utirappaṭṭikai koḷarpaṟṟu I
māṭakkuḷakkiḻ maturai koyiṟ paḷḷiaṟaikkūṭattu paḷḷippiṭam vāṇāyi
rājaṉ Eḻuntaruḷi Irukka paḷḷicantam paḻantevatāṉam nikki tevatāṉa I
ṟaiili Iṭappeṟaveṇumeṉṟu maḻavarāyaṉ namakkucoṉṉamaiyil kārāṇmai mi
yāṭci kaṭamai Antarāyam poṉvari viṉiyokam mākkalam veṭṭipāṭṭa
m pañcupili cantivikkirappeṟu Ilāñciṉaipeṟum muṉṉuṭaiyārum paḻamperum tavu
ttu tevatāṉa Iṟaiiliyāka tantom Ippaṭi namvariyilāruḷ variyum tarac co
ṉṉom Ippaṭikku nammolai piṭipāṭāka koṇṭu tiruccūlat tāpaṉam paṇ
ṇi candrādityavaṟcelvatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷka Uttaramantiri Eḻu
ttu yāṇṭu Eṭṭu nāḷ nūṟṟeḻupattañcu miḻalaikkūṟṟattu poṉpaṟṟiyuṭaiyāṉ
tiruppūvaṇamuṭaiyāṉ tiruvaraṅkatevaṉāṉa vicaiyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu miḻalaikkūṟṟattu naṭu
viṟkkūṟṟattu tirunelveliyuṭaiyāṉ tiruppūvaṇamuṭaiyāṉ nārāyaṉāṉa Īḻattaraiyaṉ
Eḻuttu miḻalaikkūṟṟattu poṉpaṟṟiyuṭaiyāṉ vāṉavaṉ viḻupparayaṉ Eḻuttu . svastiśrī .Engraved continuously
komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ coṇāṭuvaḻaṅki Aruḷiya cuntirapāṇṭiya te
vaṟku yāṇṭu Eṭṭāvatu māṭakkuḷakkiḻ maturai koyiṟ paḷḷiaṟaikkūṭattu paḷḷippiṭam vā
ṇādhirājaṉil Eḻuntaruḷi Irukka pākaṉūṟkūṟṟattu tevatāṉan tirueṭakattu Uṭaiyār tirueṭa
kamuṭaiyanāyaṉār koyiṟ śrīrudra śrīmāheśvarakku Ināyaṉāṟkku Amutupaṭi cāttu
paṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa nittaya nimantaṅkaḷukku Ikkūṟṟattu nilaikaḷil māṅkāykkuṭi niṟkkum cevakan civi
ta muṟṟūṭṭāṉa nilaṅkaḷil toṭaṉerikku kiḻellai Aṟaiyūr kiḻavaṉkālukkum paravai
ellaiyiṉ meṟkkum teṉṉellai Uṭaiyār tiruppūvaṇamuṭaiya nāyaṉār te
vatāṉa maṇṭappuṟattukkuRead maṭaipuṟattukkuvaṭakkum melellai māṅkāykkuṭip paṟṟukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭa
vellai ciṟumuttālaṅ kuḷattukku teṟkum Iṉṉāṉ kellaikkuḷpaṭṭa kuḷamum kuḷapparuRead kuḷapparippu
nañcey puṉceyyum nattamum nattappāḻumeppeṟppaṭṭaṉavum Utirappaṭṭiyāl
kaikkoḷaṟkku Iṉṉāyaṉāṟkku tirumeykāvalukku ciṟukaḻiyiṭṭa nilam 5 10m paḷḷiccanta
ppaḻantevatāṉam nikki tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliāka Iṭaveṇumeṉṟu maḻavarāya
r namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil meyyāṭci kārāṇmai Antarāyam poṉvari viṉiyokam
veṭṭipāṭṭam pañcupili cantivikkiramappeṟu Ilāñciṉaippeṟu muṉṉuṭaiyārai
yum paḻamperaiyum tavirntu tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka tantom Ippaṭi namva
riyilāruḷ variyum taraccoṉṉom Ippaṭikku nammolai piṭipāṭāka koṇṭu ti
ruccūlattāpaṉam paṇṇi candrādityavaṟcelvatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷka
puravari tiṇaikkaḷanāyakam vāṉavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Uttarapāṇṭiya viḻupparaiya
ṉeḻuttu .. rājarājaviḻupparaiyaṉ Eḻuttu . centaṉpallavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu . ṭṭu
ruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu teṉṉavataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu . pallavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu . kurukularāyaṉ
Eḻuttu toṇṭaimāṉ Eḻuttu . nantiyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu . veṇvuṇṭṭāṉRead vEṇāṭṭāṉ Eḻuttu . cetarā
yaṉ Eḻuttu . patmanāpaṉ Eḻuttu kurukulattaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu . veṇāvuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu . kaḷa
ppāḷarāyaṉ Eḻuttu . kāliṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu . Iśśilālekhai paṇṇiṉeṉ
Ikkoyil śilvācāryyaṉ pākaṉūṟkūṟṟat tācāryyaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 41.470 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
